title: DeltaPrime - Rekt
relevance_summary: Private key compromise followed by contract upgrades and withdrawals on Arbitrum

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades a proxy contract within a short timeframe followed by large withdrawals.

red_flags: Compromised admin address used to upgrade proxy contracts
Multiple rapid withdrawals following contract upgrades
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that upgrades a proxy contract within a short timeframe followed by large withdrawals.
summary: DeltaPrime suffered a $5.98 million loss due to a private key compromise, where the attacker upgraded proxy contracts and executed rapid withdrawals. A guard could have detected this by blocking upgrades followed by large withdrawals within a short timeframe.
